allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Puerto 3000 liberado")

PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | Where-Object { $_ -ne 0 -and $_ -ne 4 }; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Matando proceso $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Puerto 3000 liberado")

PowerShell(Write-Host "Matando todos los procesos Node en puerto 3000..."; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "Procesos Node limpiados")
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Proyectos Personales\\BrahamsBot\\backend'; npm run dev")
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Proyectos Personales\\BrahamsBot\\frontend'; npm run dev")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object {$_.LocalPort -in @\(5173, 5174, 5175, 3000\)} | Select-Object LocalPort, State | Sort-Object LocalPort)

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body '{"email":"admin@brahamsbot.com","password":"brahams2026"}' -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json\).data.token; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/conversations/admin/all" -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($loginResponse = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body '{"email":"admin@brahamsbot.com","password":"brahams2026"}' -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $loginResponse.data.token; Write-Host "Token obtenido. Role:" $loginResponse.data.user.role; $conversations = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/conversations/admin/all" -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "`nConversaciones encontradas:" $conversations.data.Count; $conversations.data | Select-Object -First 3 | Format-Table customer_name, channel, business_name, status -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Proyectos Personales\\BrahamsBot\\backend'; Write-Host 'Iniciando backend...'; npm run dev")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $loginResponse = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body '{"email":"admin@brahamsbot.com","password":"brahams2026"}' -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "✓ Login exitoso"; Write-Host "Email:" $loginResponse.data.user.email; Write-Host "Role:" $loginResponse.data.user.role; $token = $loginResponse.data.token; try { $conversations = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/conversations/admin/all" -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "`n✓ Endpoint /admin/all funciona!"; Write-Host "Total conversaciones:" $conversations.data.Count; $conversations.data | Format-Table customer_name, channel, business_name -AutoSize } catch { Write-Host "`n❌ Error en endpoint:" $_.Exception.Message })
